title: Name Color Editor
description: Enhance your Minecraft server's identity! Name Color Editor is a lightweight Fabric mod that allows every player to express themselves by choosing a custom color for their username.
body:
# 🎨 Name Color Editor

Enhance your Minecraft server's identity! **Name Color Editor** is a lightweight Fabric mod that allows every player to express themselves by choosing a custom color for their username and chat messages.

![GUI of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1588e5abe017087c96ef71032250f1106e0afe97_0.webp)

## ✨ Features

*   **Professional HSB Picker**: Open a beautiful, clean color editor with `/namecolor`.
    *   **16 Classic Swatches**: All standard vanilla Minecraft colors.
    *   **Hue-Saturation Square**: Pick any hue with precision.
    *   **Brightness Slider**: Fine-tune the luminosity of your chosen color.
*   **Chat Coloring Toggle**: Choose between coloring just your **name** or both your **name and chat messages**.
*   **Responsive UI**: Optimized layout that works on all screen sizes and GUI scales.
*   **Hex Support**: Type or paste any `#RRGGBB` code for total precision.
*   **Universal Visibility**: Your chosen color is shown in:
    *   💬 **Chat messages** (optional)
    *   📜 **Tab list**
    *   🏷️ **Floating Nametags** (above your head)
*   **Server-Side Sync**: Colors are synchronized automatically across all online players.
*   **Persistent Storage**: Your color preferences are saved to the server and persist across restarts.

## 🚀 Installation

### 🖥️ Client & Server
**This mod is required on both the Client and the Server.**
1.  Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for **1.21.1**.
2.  Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and place it in your `mods` folder.
3.  Place **Name Color Editor** in your `mods` folder.

## 🛠️ Commands

*   `/namecolor`: Opens the color selection GUI.
